next_steps: Open http://<ct-ip>:3000 to manage menus and asset mirroring.
Configure existing LAN DHCP with next-server=<ct-ip> and boot-filename netboot.xyz.kpxe (BIOS) or netboot.xyz.efi (UEFI).
Allow UDP 69 and TCP 80/8080 from PXE clients to the CT; web UI 3000 is LAN-admin only.
Run query --live and copy dhcp_hints from JSON for your DHCP vendor.
After deploy, create hdc-private inventory sidecars and set access.nodes[].ip.
